title: South Cape College celebrates its graduates
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Town...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Town Hall was flooded with graduates of the South Cape TVET College on Saturday 11 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Town Hall was flooded with graduates of the South Cape TVET College on Saturday 11 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These graduates, who had completed their studies at the Mossel Bay Campus, were neatly dressed in caps and gowns, celebrating their achievements alongside their families and friends."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Mayor Dirk Kotzé was also in attendance at the awards ceremony, offering words of encouragement.","html":"Mossel Bay Mayor Dirk Kotzé was also in attendance at the awards ceremony, offering words of encouragement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Afterwards, he shared photos of the event in a Facebook post and wrote: “Your commitment ensures that education in our region remains a powerful force for progress and opportunity.”","html":"Afterwards, he shared photos of the event in a Facebook post and wrote: “Your commitment ensures that education in our region remains a powerful force for progress and opportunity.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A proud Sifiso Pakade with qualification in hand. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"A proud Sifiso Pakade with qualification in hand. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The South Cape College Choir also delivered a stunning musical performance as part of the ceremony’s proceedings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the many graduates of the South Cape College, Mpumezo Mzozo. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"One of the many graduates of the South Cape College, Mpumezo Mzozo. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Campus is located on the corner of Essenhout and Kreupelhout streets in Heiderand and offers courses in electrical, mechanical, plumbing, welding and bricklaying qualifications.","html":"The Mossel Bay Campus is located on the corner of Essenhout and Kreupelhout streets in Heiderand and offers courses in electrical, mechanical, plumbing, welding and bricklaying qualifications."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
